message:
fix(locks): improve error handling for edge cases

- Add error message when server returns success=false on force-release
  (e.g., reservation not stale enough)
- Add fallback error messages in printLocksResult and runForceRelease
  when result.Error is unexpectedly empty
- Add fallback error message for renew command failures
